title: HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER SECTION 8 - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA AND COLUMBIA GORGE HOUSING AUTHORITIES HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER SECTION 8 Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable, tenant-based housing assistance for individuals who face barriers due to income, disability, or age. Assistance follows the tenant as long as they remain eligible. 500 E 2nd Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Low-income individuals and families Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4pm and by appointment Email (541) 296-5462 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-5462 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website to fill out application and be placed on waiting list. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River, Klickitat, Sherman, Skamania, and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4pm Services: Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Public Housing Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - SHELTER PLUS CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SELF-SUFFICIENCY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-COLUMBIA AND COLUMBIA GORGE HOUSING AUTHORITIES
